phase_name: session 24 — E map implemented, prolate overlap increasing
next_action: SESSION 25: (1) Increase SL grid resolution (n_grid scaling with gamma) for lam^2=100-1000. (2) Use paper's exact h_lambda coefficients (sqrt(3)/2^{11/4}*h_4 - 3/2^{17/4}*h_0). (3) Measure overlap trend — if it continues rising toward 1, that's the educated guess verified numerically.
context_notes: E map: E(h)(u) = u^{1/2} sum_{n>=1} h(nu). SL: F_gamma on [-1,1] with gamma=2*pi*lam^2. Overlap(xi,k_lam): 0.0002 (lam^2=14) -> 0.001 (lam^2=50), increasing. Large lam needs n_grid >> gamma. Scripts: connes_prolate_correct.py. Python: /c/Python313/python.exe.
